findings.evidence_context: research.json narrative.auth_narrative: 'Only the full eForms XML endpoint requires a free username and password — request via functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl, then export TENDERNED_USERNAME and TENDERNED_PASSWORD.' Vendor-published support contact from upstream OpenAPI info.contact.email; identical address already accepted at README.md, SKILL.md, brief, and spec locations.

research.json narrative.troubleshoots[0].fix: '... request credentials from functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl if you don't have them.' Same vendor-published support contact; documentation metadata, not customer PII.

Research brief inventorying endpoints: 'Base URL: https://www.tenderned.nl/papi/tenderned-rs-tns/v2. Auth required: HTTP Basic, request creds via functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl.' Same vendor functional-management contact propagated from the upstream OpenAPI spec's info.contact.email.

OpenAPI info.description body quoting the vendor's own auth instructions: 'Deze API is beveiligd via basic authentication (username/wachtwoord). Vraag deze aan via functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl.' Verbatim from the published TenderNed spec at data.overheid.nl/dataset/26e6440b-1d39-4e28-8d18-57d987042622.
OpenAPI info.contact.email field — the canonical vendor-published support address. Identical email per OpenAPI 3 spec convention; documentation metadata, not customer PII.

Authentication section: 'Only the full eForms XML endpoint requires a free username and password — request via functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl, then export TENDERNED_USERNAME...'. Official TenderNed functional-management contact taken from the spec.yaml info.contact.email and the upstream OpenAPI description (https://data.overheid.nl/dataset/26e6440b-1d39-4e28-8d18-57d987042622); vendor's published support address for requesting API credentials, not customer PII.

Troubleshooting section: '401 Unauthorized on xml fetch — The eForms XML endpoint needs Basic auth. Set TENDERNED_USERNAME and TENDERNED_PASSWORD; request credentials from functioneelbeheer@tenderned.nl if you don't have them.' Same vendor-published support contact as the Authentication section finding above (README.md:102); originates from the upstream OpenAPI info.contact.email field at data.overheid.nl/dataset/26e6440b-1d39-4e28-8d18-57d987042622. Vendor's official support address for requesting API credentials, not customer PII. Line shifted from 309 to 375 after polish added a Cookbook section.
